prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第18名（Top20），近年排名稳定在第14–18名区间，学校层次极高；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件及2022年河南断档的滞后影响；抖音热度排名第26（较热），短视频曝光中等偏上；2025年声誉文件中提及同济大学投档线暴跌至604分，可能对报考心理产生一定抑制作用；土木工程A+、城乡规划学A+、环境科学与工程A+、管理科学与工程A+、建筑学A、计算机科学与技术A等，工科实力突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；土木建筑类专业社会热度明显降温，可能影响相关大类报考热度；本省物理类考生从2021年11.7万增至2025年19.2万，2026年总考生26.79万，按历史比例估算物理类约20.4万人，竞争持续加剧，2025年物理类本科批441分，特殊类型招生控制线520分，省控线波动不大；同济大学位于上海，属一线城市，对福建省考生有较强地域吸引力；福建省非该校本地生源省份，招生计划占比约3–5%，属中等规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年物理类计划仅小幅扩招（+3人）、本省物理类考生持续增长（竞争加剧）、学校声誉偏负面但工科实力强劲等因素，在2025年基准2277名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约2339名，区间2058–2620名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1559 → 1950 → 1899 → 2504 → 2277, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 700 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 2277; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 126 in 2021, 131 in 2022, 130 in 2023, 127 in 2024, and 127 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 130, a slight expansion of 3 students (+2.4%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 18th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 14th–18th range in recent years, with a very high school level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents and the lagging impact of the 2022 Henan enrollment gap; Douyin popularity ranking 26th (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure; the 2025 reputation document mentions that Tongji University's admission score plummeted to 604 points, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology; Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Architecture A, Computer Science and Technology A, etc., with outstanding engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity; Civil and Architectural Engineering majors have significantly cooled in social popularity, which may affect the application enthusiasm of related major categories; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province increased from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, with a total of 267,900 candidates in 2026, estimated at about 204,000 for Physics Category based on historical proportions, with intensifying competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score was 441, and the special type admission control score was 520, with little fluctuation in provincial control scores; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Fujian candidates; Fujian is not the university's local source province, with enrollment plan accounting for about 3–5%, a medium scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 Physics Category plan (+3 students), the continuous growth of Physics Category candidates in the province (intensifying competition), the somewhat negative school reputation but strong engineering strength, etc., based on the 2025 baseline of 2277, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2339, with a range of 2058–2620.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2058), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
